title: Getting Started with HackerRank Contests
content: HackerRank contests are competitive programming challenges where you can test your skills against other programmers worldwide. To get started: 1) Create a HackerRank account, 2) Browse available contests, 3) Register for a contest, 4) Solve the problems within the time limit, 5) Submit your solutions. Contests are categorized by difficulty and language support. You can participate in real-time contests or practice with past contests. Prizes and leaderboard rankings are awarded based on performance.
